description:
This quiz evaluates proficiency in modern JavaScript by testing knowledge of ECMAScript features spanning from ES2015 to ES2022. Presented with a playful and slightly teasing tone, it challenges developers with multiple-choice questions that require solid intermediate-to-advanced expertise despite their straightforward appearance.
Topics: JavaScript, ECMAScript 2015-2022, Modern Language Features, Web Development
Audience: JavaScript developers and web programming learners seeking to validate their modern language proficiency
